loop_configuration.description: Execution loop governs how sessions proceed through the implementation plan. Each loop iteration processes one phase's tasks, verifies acceptance criteria, creates a handover, then stops.

loop_steps.name: verify_preconditions
loop_steps.description: Check git branch is clean, tests pass, previous handover preconditions met
loop_steps.action: Run git status, npm run test, npm run lint. Read latest handover from .agent/session-handovers/. Verify all preconditions_for_next_session are true.
loop_steps.on_failure: STOP. Report which precondition failed. Do not proceed.

loop_steps.name: load_phase_context
loop_steps.description: Read the spec, plan, and tasks for the current phase
loop_steps.action: Read .planning/cloud-deployment-optimization/specs/cloud-deployment-optimization-v1.json, plan JSON, and tasks JSON. Identify which tasks belong to the current phase and their status.

loop_steps.name: execute_tasks
loop_steps.description: Implement tasks for this phase in dependency order
loop_steps.action: Process tasks in order (by ID). For each task: read the file, make changes, verify acceptance criteria. Run relevant tests after each task. Commit after each task or logical group.
loop_steps.commit_frequency: After each task or logical group of tasks that compile together

loop_steps.name: verify_acceptance
loop_steps.action: Check the phase's acceptance criteria from the plan. Run full test suite (npm run test, npm run lint). Verify no regressions.
loop_steps.on_failure: Fix failures before proceeding. If acceptance criteria cannot be met, document why in handover.

loop_steps.name: create_handover
loop_steps.description: Write session handover JSON with all required fields
loop_steps.action: Create .agent/session-handovers/cloud-deploy-opt-<YYYYMMDD-HHMM>.json using the template from sessions/handover-template-v1.json. Include git SHA, test results, tasks completed, known issues, and context_to_restore.

loop_steps.name: stop
loop_steps.description: End the session. The next session resumes from the handover.
loop_steps.action: Report session completion with summary of what was done. Next phase or session can begin independently.

parallel_execution.description: Tasks within a phase can run in parallel if they have no dependencies on each other. Cross-phase tasks must be sequential.

before_handover: All tasks in phase marked complete or documented as deferred
Git working tree clean (all changes committed)
Handover file written with all required fields
before_next_phase: No unresolved known_issues blocking the next phase

escalation_rules.description: When to stop and escalate rather than continue working

rules.condition: Task cannot be completed after 2 attempts
rules.action: Document in known_issues, create handover, stop. Operator must review.

rules.condition: Test suite regression detected (previously passing test now fails)
rules.action: Revert the change that caused the regression. If root cause unclear, document and escalate.
Create handover with current state, stop. Continue in next session.

rules.condition: New requirement discovered that changes spec
rules.action: Document the discovery, do not implement. Escalate to operator for spec update.
